title: orthion veracruzense
intro: Orthion veracruzense, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Orthion veracruzense have been found to have several health benefits, including pain relief, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Orthion veracruzense can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
